query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of a human eye and surrounding facial features, including the eyebrow, upper eyelid, cheek, and nose bridge, with the face filling the entire frame. The subject is presented in monochrome brown tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extreme close-up of a human eye and surrounding facial features rendered nearly unrecognizable through severe intentional blur and a total absence of fine detail. The subject dissolves into an abstract, dreamlike haze of smeared, mushy textures, oppressively low-contrast brown monochrome, and washed-out sepia tones that collapse the face into soft, indistinct contours.
